title: Organization Memory
description: Persistent organizational memory storing all assessment history, recommendations, changes, and learning across sessions.

organizationId.description: Unique identifier for this organization memory record

companyProfileId.description: Reference to the company profile associated with this organization memory

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this organization memory was first created

lastActivityAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent activity recorded in this organization memory

type.description: Classification of what occurred during this session

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the session was completed

summary.description: High-level summary of what happened during the session

keyFindings.description: Key findings or discoveries from this session

evidence.description: Evidence collected or referenced during this session

metadata.description: Session-specific metadata with arbitrary key-value pairs

items.description: A single interaction or work session with the organization

sessions.description: Historical record of all sessions conducted with this organization

version.description: Version identifier of the assessment framework used

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the assessment was completed

opportunityMapId.description: Identifier of the opportunity map generated by this assessment

totalOpportunities.description: Total number of opportunities identified in this assessment

topRecommendation.description: Highest-priority recommendation resulting from this assessment

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the assessment findings and recommendations

items.description: A single assessment record in the organization history

assessmentHistory.description: All assessments performed for this organization over time

title.description: Title or short description of the recommendation

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this recommendation

recommendedAt.description: Timestamp when this recommendation was first made

statusChangedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent status change

changedAt.description: Timestamp when the status change occurred

reason.description: Reason or trigger for the status change

items.description: A single status transition record for this recommendation

statusChanges.description: Full history of status changes for this recommendation

outcome.description: Description of what happened when this recommendation was deployed

lessonsLearned.description: Lessons extracted from implementing or attempting this recommendation

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this recommendation and its outcome

items.description: A single recommendation with its lifecycle tracking

recommendationHistory.description: All recommendations made to this organization over time with status tracking

changeId.description: Unique identifier for this change record

type.description: Category of change that was detected

previousState.description: Description of the state before the change occurred

newState.description: Description of the state after the change occurred

detectedAt.description: Timestamp when the change was detected

impact.description: Assessed impact level of this change on the organization

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the change detection and assessment

items.description: A single organizational change that was detected and tracked

changes.description: Organizational changes detected over time that may affect recommendations and assessments

knowledgeId.description: Unique identifier for this knowledge item

topic.description: Topic or subject area this knowledge item pertains to

content.description: The knowledge content or assertion being stored

source.description: Origin classification of this knowledge item

confidence.description: Confidence level assigned to this knowledge item

validated.description: Whether this knowledge item has been validated

validatedAt.description: Timestamp when this knowledge item was last validated

replaces.description: Knowledge ID of the item that this knowledge item supersedes

tags.description: Tags for categorization and filtering of this knowledge item

items.description: A single knowledge item stored in the organization memory

knowledge.description: Accumulated knowledge about the organization from all sources and sessions

type.description: Channel or medium of the conversation

role.description: Role of the participant in the conversation

name.description: Name or identifier of the participant

items.description: A single participant in the conversation

participants.description: List of participants involved in this conversation

summary.description: High-level summary of the conversation content

keyPoints.description: Key points raised or discussed during the conversation

owner.description: Person responsible for completing this action item

dueDate.description: Date by which this action item should be completed

status.description: Current status of this action item

items.description: A single action item derived from the conversation

actionItems.description: Action items captured from this conversation

items.description: A single conversation recorded in the organization memory

conversations.description: Conversations with and about this organization across all channels

context.description: Context in which this lesson was learned

appliesTo.description: Departments, systems, or areas this lesson applies to

items.description: A single lesson learned and stored in the organization memory

lessons.description: Lessons learned from assessments, deployments, and interactions with this organization

sourceId.description: Identifier of the source entity in this relationship

targetId.description: Identifier of the target entity in this relationship

relationship.description: Description of the relationship between source and target

strength.description: Strength of the relationship from 0 to 1

items.description: A single relationship between entities tracked in the organization memory

relationships.description: Relationships between entities, opportunities, technologies, and other tracked items

knownFactsCount.description: Total number of known facts currently stored in this organization memory

openQuestions.description: Questions about this organization that remain unanswered

confidenceTrajectory.description: Direction of confidence trajectory in the organization data quality

lastAssessmentHealth.description: Health status of the most recent assessment data

nextScheduledReview.description: Scheduled date and time for the next organizational review

state.description: Current summary state of the organization memory

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level indicating reliability of a piece of evidence

type.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

source.description: The origin or source of this evidence

detail.description: Detailed description of the evidence content

url.description: URL reference to the source of this evidence

confidence.description: Confidence level in this evidence item

evidenceItem.description: A single evidence item used across the Compass platform
